name: Prize Orange Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the chortening with sugar until smooth.
2. Add grated orange rind, eggs yolks, and blend together.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture with orange juice and water.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form and fold in gently.
6. Pour batter evenly into three greased and floured 9-inch cake pans.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Assemble layers with orange filling and cover with orange frosting.
9. To make orange filling: Mix flour, cornstarch, sugar, salt, egg yolks in a double boiler. Gradually add orange juice, lemon juice, water, and grated orange rind. Cook until thick, about 20 minutes. Cool before spreading between cake layers.
10. For orange frosting: Combine white corn syrup, sugar, grated orange rind, egg white, and orange juice in a double boiler. Cook until thickened for 6-7 minutes. Remove from heat, stir in lemon juice and salt. Beat thoroughly and spread over the cake.
